zh.lifeSummary: Richard Fiske於1493年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德。他於1520年與Elizabeth Joan Gould在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年11月8日在英國諾福爾可賀金哈姆享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Fiske was born in 1493, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Elizabeth Joan Gould in 1520, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 8 November 1549, in Heckingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Fiske est né en 1493, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Elizabeth Joan Gould en 1520, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1549, à Heckingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Fiske wurde 1493 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1520 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Joan Gould geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. November 1549 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Heckingham, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Fiske è nato il nel 1493 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Elizabeth Joan Gould nel 1520, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 8 novembre 1549, nel Heckingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fiskeは1493年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた。1520年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでElizabeth Joan Gouldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年11月8日にイギリスノーフォルクヘクインガムで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fiske(은)는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Elizabeth Joan Gould(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 11월 8일 영국 노르폴크 헤킨그함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Fiske родился в 1493 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 8 ноября 1549 г. в местности хеккингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.
